title: Eminence Refund - Do or DAI
relevance_summary: Refund transaction after a large hack where attackers returned part of the stolen funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds to a known attacker address after a large hack

summary: A sophisticated hack on the EMN contract resulted in $15M loss, but attackers returned $8M. Users accidentally donated their refunds to the attackers. A refund mechanism was implemented to distribute the remaining funds.
